text: As I step through the doors and into this curated space, I feel a heightened curiosity stir within me. The bold display of R+D—Research and Development—invites reflection on the ways we, as humans, continuously adapt and innovate to coexist with our ever-evolving environment. There’s a sense of anticipation, as if the walls themselves urge me to ponder the intricate dance between technology, art, and humanity. I am simultaneously in the present moment and in thoughtful speculation about future possibilities.
